mapper.sql: id, template_id, employee_id, indicator_id, self_score, self_comment, self_submit_time, supervisor_id, supervisor_score, supervisor_comment, supervisor_submit_time, final_score, score_status, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM appraisal_score_record WHERE template_id = #{templateId} AND employee_id = #{employeeId} ORDER BY indicator_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO appraisal_score_record (template_id, employee_id, indicator_id, self_score, self_comment, self_submit_time, supervisor_id, supervisor_score, supervisor_comment, supervisor_submit_time, final_score, score_status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{templateId}, #{employeeId}, #{indicatorId}, #{selfScore}, #{selfComment}, #{selfSubmitTime}, #{supervisorId}, #{supervisorScore}, #{supervisorComment}, #{supervisorSubmitTime}, #{finalScore}, #{scoreStatus}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE appraisal_score_record SET self_score = #{selfScore}, self_comment = #{selfComment}, self_submit_time = NOW(), score_status = CASE WHEN score_status = 'pending' THEN 'self_done' ELSE score_status END, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE appraisal_score_record SET supervisor_score = #{supervisorScore}, supervisor_comment = #{supervisorComment}, supervisor_id = #{supervisorId}, supervisor_submit_time = NOW(), score_status = 'supervisor_done', update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM appraisal_score_record WHERE template_id = #{templateId} AND employee_id = #{employeeId}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM appraisal_score_record WHERE template_id = #{templateId} ORDER BY employee_id, indicator_id
